audit_log.check: Autonomy: PASS (measurement frameworks guide decisions, not prescribe actions)
Proof Discipline: PASS (ncROAS validates true profitability vs platform vanity metrics)
No Manipulation: PASS (truth in reporting; distinguish Platform ROAS from MER)

dependency.notes: M3 Swim Lanes enable clean ncROAS calculation

component.activation_strategy: RIGHT analytical truth (Incremental ROAS not inflated Platform ROAS) + BOTTOM risk management (IF ncROAS <1.0 → Stop scaling)

framework.name: Incremental Attribution Check
framework.key_quote: "It's only focused on conversions that happened because of Facebook... not Facebook slipping in at the last second."
framework.summary: Validates if ads drive new revenue or just retarget people who would have bought anyway.

steps.step: Go to Ads Manager → Columns → "Compare Attribution Settings"
Metric: IF gap >30% THEN ad likely over-crediting retargeting

framework.action_trigger: IF Incremental ROAS <50% of Platform ROAS → Switch to Incremental optimization or tighten exclusions

framework.name: Lead Gen Lag-Time Optimization
framework.key_quote: "If we wait all the way to the end point we have a massive gap in between."
framework.summary: Adjust conversion event based on sales cycle length to ensure pixel gets data within 7-day attribution window.

decision_tree.decision: IF Lag Time <7 days → Optimize for Bottom-Funnel (Sale/Purchase/Closed Deal)
IF Lag Time 7-14 days → Optimize for Mid-Funnel (Qualified Lead/Booked Appointment)
IF Lag Time >14 days → Optimize for Top-Funnel (Lead Submission/Content Download)

framework.rule: Must select event that fires within 7-day attribution window for consistent pixel feedback

framework.name: ncROAS Calculation (New Customer ROAS)
framework.formula: (Total Revenue - Returning Customer Revenue) / Ad Spend
framework.target: >1.5x ncROAS is scalable; <1.0x is burning cash (unless LTV massive)
framework.application: Weekly reporting metric; primary scaling decision input

framework.name: MER King Goal Monitoring
framework.key_quote: "Your king goal... overrides all other goals."
framework.formula: MER = Total Revenue (all sources) / Total Ad Spend (all channels)
framework.validation: IF Platform ROAS rises but MER stays flat → Attribution Hallucination (Meta claiming organic sales)
framework.threshold: Target MER varies by business model; typical 2.5-3.0+ for profitable ecom

framework.name: Attribution Window Configuration
framework.rationale: Tighten attribution windows at scale to prevent over-crediting view-throughs

framework.name: Value Rules Bidding
framework.summary: Adjust bids based on high-value attributes platform can't see (LTV segments).
framework.example: IF Men have 150% LTV vs Women → Set rule: "If Gender = Men, Bid +20%"
framework.requirement: Need 6-12 months customer data; min 100 customers per segment for statistical validity

category.name: Diagnostic
category.heuristic: IF Platform ROAS >3.0 but MER <2.0 THEN "Attribution Hallucination" (Meta claiming organic sales) [SRC: Sam Piliero | 777]
IF "One Day View" conversions >50% of total THEN ads are retargeting, not prospecting [SRC: Tier 11 | 698]
IF lead volume high but "Booked Call" volume low THEN optimize deeper in funnel (Lag Time Optimization) [SRC: Caden Thompson | 291]
IF ncROAS <1.0 THEN paying more to acquire customer than worth; stop scaling immediately [SRC: Sam Piliero | 777]

category.name: Optimization
category.heuristic: IF high LTV segment exists (e.g., Men) THEN use "Value Rules" to increase bids +20% for that segment [SRC: Sam Piliero | 784]
IF spending >$100k/mo THEN switch to "Incremental" or "1-day click" attribution [SRC: Sam Piliero | 729]
IF creative has high Incremental ROAS THEN true scaler; move to scale campaign [SRC: Sam Piliero | 628]

category.name: Scaling
category.heuristic: IF ncROAS >1.5x THEN increase budget by 20% [SRC: Justin Lalonde | 7]
IF using Cost Caps THEN understand spend is variable (high on good days, low on bad) [SRC: Sam Piliero | 520]

steps.step: Action: IF ad drops >50% ROAS under Incremental → Pause or move to Retargeting
Pull Total Ad Spend from Meta

knowledge_block.metrics_table:
<metric name="ncROAS" purpose="True scalability" threshold=">1.5x" action_trigger="IF <1.0 → Stop scaling" source="[SRC: Sam Piliero | 777]"/> <metric name="Incremental ROAS" purpose="Attribution truth" threshold=">1.0 (Lift)" action_trigger="IF <0.5 → Retargeting not prospecting" source="[SRC: Sam Piliero | 595]"/>
<metric name="Lag Time" purpose="Event selection" threshold="<7 Days" action_trigger="IF >7 → Move optimization up-funnel" source="[SRC: Caden Thompson | 289]"/> <metric name="Event Match Quality" purpose="Data integrity" threshold=">7.0 (out of 10)" action_trigger="IF <6.0 → Fix CAPI/Pixel" source="[SRC: Tier 11 | 691]"/>

failure_mode.name: Attribution Hallucination
failure_mode.symptoms: Ads Manager shows 5x ROAS but bank account empty / MER flat
failure_mode.recovery: Switch to Incremental Attribution or stricter exclusions

failure_mode.name: Pixel Malnutrition
failure_mode.symptoms: Zero conversions showing despite sales happening
failure_mode.root_cause: Lag time >7 days or CAPI disconnected
failure_mode.recovery: Optimize for higher-funnel event (Lead vs Sale) or fix CAPI

failure_mode.name: Junk Lead Spiral
failure_mode.symptoms: Low CPL but zero sales/booked calls
failure_mode.root_cause: Optimizing for "Lead" without quality filter; algorithm finding bots
failure_mode.recovery: Switch to "Booked Call" or import "Qualified Lead" offline events

compliance_guardrails.guardrail: When using CAPI, hash PII (emails/phones) before sending to Meta [SRC: Tier 11 | 699]
Never report "Blended ROAS" as "Ad Performance"; distinguish Platform ROAS from MER [SRC: Sam Piliero | 777]
Exclude 180-day purchasers from Prospecting to ensure clean ncROAS [SRC: Sam Piliero | 716]
